data.content:
Branch: feat/foolery-17ee-queue-buttons
Commit: 67fb7999
Scope: Queue multiselect buttons now use title-bar-aligned typography and non-white purple/green theme variants without behavior changes.
Validation: Chrome DevTools computed styles on localhost:3001/beats confirmed Manrope 14.875px/600 on title-bar and multiselect buttons, with non-white secondary/success-light backgrounds; Playwright screenshots captured before-queue-multiselect.png and after-queue-multiselect.png.
